g.title: serial.record_entry:record->biblio.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (record) REFERENCES biblio.record_entry(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.record_entry:owning_lib->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owning_lib) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.distribution:record_entry->serial.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (record_entry) REFERENCES serial.record_entry(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
